name: Mutant Mindmaster
name_jp: ミュータント・ハイブレイン
desc: When this card declares an attack, you can take control of 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls, and attack with it instead of this monster. It cannot attack your opponent directly. Return it to your opponent at the end of the Battle Phase.
mnst_eff: When this card declares an attack, you can take control of 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls, and attack with it instead of this monster. It cannot attack your opponent directly. Return it to your opponent at the end of the Battle Phase.
eff: When this card declares an attack, you can take control of 1 face-up Attack Position monster your opponent controls, and attack with it instead of this monster. It cannot attack your opponent directly. Return it to your opponent at the end of the Battle Phase.

jp_sets.set: Duelist Road -Piece of Memory- Side: Yami Yugi

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
